name: Rifle
description: Rifles cover a broad middle ground, usually offering fast fire, good accuracy, manageable recoil, and average reloads. Their exact feel changes sharply by manufacturer: Dahl versions lean into controlled burst fire, Jakobs versions hit hard with precise semi-auto shots and heavier kick, and Torgue versions trade bullet speed for gyrojet splash damage. Some part combinations, such as Vladof-barreled Dahl Double Tap rolls, push them into much stranger territory with multi-shot bursts and rapid ammo use.
notes: Most manufacturers can roll the Rifle title, but Bandit uses the Mashine Gun name instead. Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
